agent.name: Summarize text into bullet points
agent.summary: Custom agent for summarize text into bullet points
agent.description:
Task: Summarize text into bullet points
Expected inputs: A block of text
Expected outputs: Markdown bullet-point summary

input: AgentOS is a library of pre-built AI agents that anyone can import and use. It wraps the Anthropic Claude SDK and provides 8 agents out of the box. Users authenticate via OAuth tokens from their Claude Max plan.
inputPreview: AgentOS is a library of pre-built AI agents that anyone can import and use. It wraps the Anthropic Claude SDK and provides 8 agents out of the box. Users authenticate via OAuth tokens from their Claude Max plan.
output:
Here is a bullet-point summary of the provided text:

- **AgentOS** is a pre-built library of AI agents available for anyone to import and use.
- It is built on top of the **Anthropic Claude SDK**, wrapping its functionality for easier access.
- The library comes with **8 agents included out of the box**, ready to use without custom setup.
- Users authenticate using **OAuth tokens** obtained through their **Claude Max plan** subscription.
